title: stelis rudiculifera
intro: Stelis rudiculifera, also known as the "rough-stemmed orchid," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis rudiculifera include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Stelis rudiculifera is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
